title: Procos 92202 Marvel Mighty Avengers Paper Cups, 200 ml, Pack of 8, Superhero Cups, Drinking Cups, Birthday, Theme Party
features: Paper cups with trendy Mighty Avengers motif for any children's birthday party
The pack contains 8 colourful Mighty Avengers mugs
They have a capacity of 200 ml each
Disposable cups make after party clean-up quick and convenient
Practical to use and decorative on the table
description: Paper cups with trendy Mighty Avengers motif for every child's birthday. The pack contains 8 colourful Mighty Avengers mugs. They have a capacity of 200 ml each. Disposable cups make after party clean-up quick and convenient. Practical to use and decorative on the table. Discover a range of party tableware and decorations that coordinate perfectly with each other.
